title: Google tasks integration please
excerpt:

posts.author: CarlosVeliz (Carlos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our team is thrilled to use Monday because of its wide range of integrations. However, the one we truly need is a two-way integration with Google Tasks.

We currently use Google Workspace in our organization to manage projects and tasks. While we find Google Tasks quite limited as a task manager, we really appreciate how tasks can be created directly from Google Docs, Gmail, and Google Calendar. The integration between Google Workspace and its task features is excellent—but the task manager itself is not.

That’s why we need Monday to be fully integrated with Google Tasks in both directions.

posts.author: huysgt (HarryNg)
posts.cookedHtml:
From what I’ve seen, Monday mostly offers integrations with the big essential apps, but not Google Tasks specifically. I think stuff like this gets left to third-party tools since it’s probably too niche for them to build directly.

Have you found any kind of workaround yet? Like using Make.com or Zapier or something? I’ve seen people use those for other gaps
